chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5523 of 2022 CP D 5188 of 2022 CP D 5189 of 2022 CP D 5695 of 2022 CP D 5735 of 2022 CP D 7006 of 2022 CP D 7007 of 2022 CP D 2922 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.23601/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 27.03.2025 Mr. Ghulam Hussain Shah, advocate and Mr. Sami ur Rehman, advocate for the petitioner in CPs D 5523, 5695 & 5735 of 2022. Mir Moula Bux Tunio, advocate holding brief for Mr. Haider Waheed, advocate for the petitioners in CPs D 5188, 5189, of 2022. Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for the respondent No.4. Mr. Nadir Hussain, advocate holding brief for Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. Per learned counsel, notices have been issued herein, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks for notices to be adjudicated vide speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioners and pending aforesaid, no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for the respondent department articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petitions be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in each connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
